positive: Minimalist stylized mountain range silhouette at sunset, viewed through a perfect archway. The scene should feature sharp, deep blue and lavender mountains contrasting against a vibrant gradient sky of burnt orange, peach, and pale yellow. Incorporate delicate, abstract constellations and a crescent moon visible in the sky. The overall composition must be centered and balanced, suitable for a T-shirt graphic. Use a clean vector art aesthetic with rich, solid color areas and precise linework. Perfect for apparel printing, high detail, smooth gradients, centered composition, strong contrast.
